sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70766" key="nhso/polis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νησό-πολις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n70766.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">island-city,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0070.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.Char.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
